element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Traversal of upside-down ceiling sections; enables vertical exploration
Core goal structure; some require colored teacup prerequisites
Incremental bouncing for height gain; safe vertical progression
Projectile combat; different foods produce different effects (homing missiles, etc.)
Block and TNT destruction; self-damage risk; timing-critical
Throwable variant of dynamite; safer than immediate detonation
2+ hit protection; enables traversal through hazardous liquids (custard)
Reveals hidden blocks as translucent; enables secret route discovery
Breakable object releasing ghost; bouncing mechanic for vertical progression
Rocket thruster with fuel management; equipped yogurt cannon; fuel cans scattered in levels

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mid game (after rescue in specific level)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Belly-bounce mechanic for repeated height increases; limited gadget compatibility (chattering teeth only)
Four teacups must be collected to activate certain beacons; hidden pickups reveal secret routes

element_introduction_order.first_appears: End of each themed section (Cheese, Custard, Ice Cream, etc.)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Combat encounters testing accumulated skills and gadget knowledge
Required for complete ending; component of final challenge structure
All mines must be destroyed for story completion; guides primary progression

typical_relief_triggers: Discovery of gadgets enabling safe traversal
Return from upside-down ceiling sections to normal gravity
Fruit Suit pickup reducing damage threat
typical_tension_triggers: Teacup collection prerequisites creating backtracking need
Transition from gadget-rich to gadget-sparse level sections
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical pacing tied to themed world structure (Cheese → Custard → Ice Cream sections); gadget introduction creates escalating complexity; relief through character switching (Finnius alternative) and secret route discovery

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden pickups reveal secret routes upon level completion (mirrors Super Mario World convention); X-ray specs expose hidden blocks as translucent
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret routes accessible through hidden pickups; finding certain secret levels essential to achieving full ending; Stiltonium extractors and all Cheese Mines must be destroyed for complete game ending

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundation-focused with basic movement and beacon destruction; Garden of Edam introductory level; simple gadget encounters (spring shoes, fruit gun basics)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Gadget complexity escalation (dynamite, bombs, fruit suit); magno-boots ceiling navigation mastery required; teacup collection prerequisites introduce puzzle elements; character-switching mechanics available
difficulty_curve.late_game: Jetpack fuel management; Stiltonium extractor destruction; high-precision platforming; integration of multiple gadget types; full ending requires secret level discovery and complete destruction targets
notable_spikes: Boss fights at end of each themed section
Ceiling (upside-down) navigation sections requiring magno-boots mastery
Jetpack-dependent level sequences with fuel scarcity
Final level incorporating all accumulated mechanics for complete ending achievement

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Themed World Sections with Boss Culmination
notable_level_patterns.description: Game organized into themed sections (Cheese, Custard, Ice Cream, etc.) with multiple levels per section, culminating in mandatory boss fight; structure mirrors Super Mario World world progression
Levels featuring ceiling navigation where player runs upside-down on magno-boots; player only falls if intentionally jumping off; creates spatial disorientation tension and unique traversal puzzle
Levels containing gadgets (spring shoes, jetpack, fruit gun) that enable access to otherwise unreachable areas; gadget scarcity creates resource management tension
Certain beacon activations require collecting four colored teacups scattered throughout level; adds secondary objective layer and encourages thorough exploration
Hidden pickups discovered during level completion reveal secret routes on world map; essential for accessing secret levels needed for full ending; encourages replayability
Levels featuring dangerous liquids (custard, etc.) requiring Fruit Suit for safe traversal or alternative gadget paths; safety gear acts as damage mitigation
